chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 215 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of MA 709/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.11.2025. None present on behalf of the petitioners / tenants. No intimation is received. On the last date of hearing the counsel had submitted that he has lost contact with the petitioners / tenants and that he will apprise the Court with regard to further proceedings however, no one is in attendance today. On 25.07.2025 this Court directed the petitioners / tenants to publish notice of filing this petition as the respondents have yet to enter appearance however, same has been pending for last four months with costs yet to be paid. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest. After the judgment dated 12.11.2024 passed by the 1st Rent Controller, Hyderabad granting the Respondent No.1’s Rent Application No.137/2023, the petitioners / tenants were ordered to be ejected and directed to handover the peaceful, vacant and physical possession of the rent premises. The challenge to the said judgment by the petitioners / tenants too was dismissed vide judgment dated 15.05.2025 passed by the IIIrd Additional District Judge, Hyderabad in F.R.A No.125/2024 hence this petition. No stay was passed by this Court since its institution till date. Meanwhile, I have perused the documents available on record and do not find any ground to conclude that the judgments of the lower forum are “without lawful authority” and “of no legal effect”. None have entered appearance too. Accordingly given the above, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application.
None have entered appearance too. Accordingly given the above, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE
